ca1a1af8-1d1b-4eef-892b-8d92b0a89d41.Text: For one round, attacks against a target affected by an {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g}, that target's {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover efficiency{/g} and block will be reduced by −<u>(15 + ({unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} / 2) × stacks of exploit)</u>%. This attack will have +<u>(15 + ({unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} / 2) × stacks of exploit)</u>% {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit chance{/g}. Single-shot and melee attacks will do +{uip|damagebonus|d9e00160ce96479281c1abe9a26ac4e5}% critical damage.

c9d22b73-9f30-40ec-8550-00bdbfa2f8c6.Text: {g|f:7b00b5ea0dc246e1a304619d5678ca5b}Precise Attack{/g} grants the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g} a {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} equal to <u>(number of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploits{/g} removed)</u> (minimum 1) until the end of combat. Stacks.

de578abd-c1e5-42da-b022-e431e335a598.Text: If the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g} uses {g|f:7b00b5ea0dc246e1a304619d5678ca5b}Precise Attack{/g} on a target affected by {uip|MinimumStacks|5be08b3ea6fa4b82a3473de749e68488} or more {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploits{/g} and scores a {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g}, that hit becomes a {g|Encyclopedia:CritChancesAndCritDamageGlossary}critical hit{/g}.

d9fe0ee9-f347-417a-9bdc-380fb74c9318.Text: Whenever the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g} triggers an {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g} on an enemy, the Operative gains +2 damage, +2% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}, and +4 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} until the end of combat. Only applies to the first strike or projectile in a {g|Encyclopedia:BurstAttacksGlossary}burst{/g} attack. Stacks.

a6b9621a-5d74-43d9-9b6e-5d3402b6550b.Text:
The Operative removes all {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploits{/g} from the target, decreasing the target's {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} by −<u>(20 + exploits removed × {uip|multipliyer|fbdba5fe2a264c25bada29aecd64049a})</u>% until the start of the Operative's next turn.
If this ability reduces the target's armour to 0, the Operative removes only half of the exploits from the target.
The target will suffer an increased {uip|criticalbonus|fbdba5fe2a264c25bada29aecd64049a}% critical chance from attackers, and the first single target attack each turn against this target by the Operative will not count towards the attack limit.
If the target is not affected by any {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploits{/g}, the Operative will do an additional +{uip|exposedamagebonus|fbdba5fe2a264c25bada29aecd64049a}% damage to exposed targets.

3269e346-5c49-4e64-b9a9-7b6033a7d11a.Text:
While the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g}'s {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} bonus is 10 or higher, they gain +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} and ignore enemies' {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}.
Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill are increased by {uip|StatBonus|1d6a3bacdb914699b83d564a1f22bfbc}.

651f40ee-ed3f-4d2a-9c5b-6442666e385b.Text: The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g} targets one enemy within {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g}. That target immediately gains +{uip|Exploits|502b9195c84c42c5b180f3f63ed7955c} {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploits{/g}.

43ab4851-d540-43eb-b72d-49d1df84a3f8.Text: The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g} inflicts an {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g} even on enemies which are out of the Operative's {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} at the start of the {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}. They will also gain a {uip|dodgebonus|8341c8a0c79c4982a8cef0bbd2d1a2a2}% increase to their dodge chance.

e2921f84-b672-427f-95e9-d0acf6d9bbf2.Text: The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g} suffers −{uip|DamageReduction|4c56ec5c399f4c70815dd5596b0e7b83}% less {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} from enemies affected by {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploits{/g}.

1973b25f-e5c3-4428-a497-510eea0ccb7f.Text:
The Operative gains +25% {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}cover{/g} efficiency (if in cover), +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g}, +20 {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill}Ballistic Skill{/g}, and a 75% recoil reduction.
Deadeye shots will do additional base damage equal to the <u>current weapon's maximum damage.</u>
This effect lasts until the Operative moves. Does not stack.

4670a313-ac58-4c74-a789-b4249ff00ece.Text: If the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g} has not moved this {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, they deal +{uip|DamageBonus|9a0e7e64902e491baa29d60469eae188} more damage with {g|Encyclopedia:SingleRangedAttacksGlossary}single-shot{/g} attacks for every 3 cells between them and the target and gain +{unit_stat|WarhammerPerception|bonus} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerBallisticSkill} Ballistic Skill{/g}. These bonuses do not stack and last until the Operative moves.

5181bb6a-f7e8-4866-aa8d-2bd9dcf62fb6.Text: On their first {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g} in combat, the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g} randomly distributes the same number of {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploits{/g} as when using {g|f:502b9195c84c42c5b180f3f63ed7955c}Analyse Enemies{/g} among all enemies in a 10-cell radius around the Operative. At the start of each of the Operative's subsequent turns, they distribute half as many exploits (half the base amount) among all enemies in a 3-cell radius around the Operative.

e2c9d44f-e79d-4979-888b-21522ab0a7ad.Text:
Whenever the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g} attacks an enemy that is at 50% or higher {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, that attack deals +{uip|DamageBonus|ed9d1434d0fd41e2a382a2efe0a2018a}% more {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} to that enemy with a +{uip|CriticalBonus|ed9d1434d0fd41e2a382a2efe0a2018a}% increased critical chance.
Upon killing a target who the Operative has marked with {g|f:197b8a8a12b0442db7ffee1067cf3d97}Expose Weakness{/g}, +1 AP is restored and the cooldown for {g|f:197b8a8a12b0442db7ffee1067cf3d97}Expose Weakness{/g} is reset.

c6540399-6208-4040-b0e3-b5b83d91ba1d.Text:
The Operative immediately inflicts +1 {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g} on each enemy in combat, then makes a free attack against a target (can even use a ranged weapon in melee range). This attack always {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hits{/g}.
Until the end of combat, the target of this attack suffers a −30% penalty to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}block{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}.
For the rest of combat, the Operative will start each turn (including this attack) prepared for an {g|f:0d6fd1192a5646da86594c8419b48201}alpha strike{/g}.

efbbf011-472f-4df9-a464-130e83f9b80d.Text:
The first attack each turn will automatically be a critical hit and will not consume movement points.
If the target is under the effect of {g|f:197b8a8a12b0442db7ffee1067cf3d97}Expose Weakness{/g} they will receive an additional +<u>({g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}PER{/g} bonus + {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}INT bonus{/g})</u> base damage,+<u>({g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}PER{/g} bonus + {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}INT bonus{/g}) × 5</u>% damage, and will suffer the effects of {g|f:264e8fc120fc4cdda336d31ddc0c15f7}dismantling attack{/g} for one round.

945ac069-a2c8-4a34-9b8f-2e82d52edd6a.Text:
The Operative immediately inflicts +1 {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g} on each enemy in combat, then makes a free attack against a target (can even use a ranged weapon in melee range). This attack always {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hits{/g} and for the rest of combat, the Operative will start each turn (including this attack) prepared for an {g|f:0d6fd1192a5646da86594c8419b48201}alpha strike{/g}(including this attack).
-<indent=5%>Until the end of combat, the target of this attack suffers a −30% penalty to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}block{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g}, and {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parry{/g}.</indent>
-<indent=5%>Until the end of combat, the Operative's attacks cost +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} more.</indent>

a13c06f0-e420-4654-bf76-8ba4f796cca8.Text:
While the {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g} is in {g|Encyclopedia:DetailsOfTheCoverGlossary}partial cover{/g}, their cover efficiency is increased by +15%. This {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} is doubled if the Operative has not moved during their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.
After attacking the Operative may reposition if they critically strike, gaining +4 MP.

a351eae1-f80a-42cf-bb2a-4a3ff55cb8df.Text:
The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g}'s next non-{g|Encyclopedia:AreaOfEffect}area attack{/g} inflicts the intimidated effect on the first target {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} by the attack and all enemies in a 5-cell radius around that target.
The {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} dealt by intimidated enemies is reduced by −{uip|DamagePenalty|aedb4d2a2fd049db9c3f61b6737043a4}% until the Operative's next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}. This {g|Encyclopedia:NegativeEffectTypesGlossary}negative effect{/g} is doubled for enemies with less than {uip|MinimumArmour|aedb4d2a2fd049db9c3f61b6737043a4}% {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}.
If using a melee attack, this attack will cost -1 AP. On a critical hit, the Operative will do additional base damage equal to the <u>current weapon's maximum damage</u> and they will knock the target prone if they fail a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} check with a -({unit_stat|WarhammerWeaponSkill|bonus} × 3) penalty.

5a3e6aac-67ad-4076-9d7f-0878ef6564cc.Text:
The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g} removes −1 {g|Encyclopedia:Exploit}exploit{/g} from each enemy in a 5-cell radius around a point within 10 cells from the Operative. If there is only one enemy in the area, the Operative removes all exploit stacks from that enemy.
All allies gain +<u>(2 × exploits removed)</u>% {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} until the end of combat. If 4 or more exploits are removed, the Operative deals +<u>(5 × exploits removed)</u>% more {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} until the end of combat.

17dc0236-202f-44ce-bb67-0be99ad8f913.Text: This character gains +<u>(2 × number of exploits removed)</u>% {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} until the end of combat.

e969dc04-3b60-406b-ae9c-105e6fa2d98e.Text: The {g|Encyclopedia:CareerAdeptGlossary}Operative{/g} deals +<u>(5 × number of exploits removed)</u>% more {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} until the end of combat.
